properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can hear You calling my name The ocean between us erased and salvation pours down like rain Flooding my walls till I break till I break

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I give my life to You my heart to You Your all I need come and make me new I give my life to you my heart to You Your all I need So come and make me new

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I abandon The weight of my sin the weight of my loss and my pain and relief swells like air in my lungs and freedom releases my shame My shame

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I give my life to You my heart to You Your all I need so come and make me new I give my life to You my heart to You Your all I need so come and make me new

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus Christ take our lives we won't waste another day Holy God fill our hearts we won't ever be the same

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus Christ take our lives we won't waste another day Holy God fill our hearts we won't ever be the same

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Jesus Christ take our lives we won't waste another day Holy God fill our hearts we won't ever be the same

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I give my life to You my heart to You Your all I need so come and make me new I give my life to You my heart to You Your all I need so come and make me new

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I give my life to You My heart to you Your all I need So come and make me new I give my life to You my heart to You Your all I need So come and make me new
